Algorithm 1 SPEGC: Continual Test-Time Adaptation via Semantic-Prompt-Enhanced Graph Clustering
1: Initialize: Source-trained model fσ with parameters σ ←σS;
Learnable prompt pools PCO ∈RM×h, PHE ∈RM×h;
Learnable projections Wq ∈Rh×h, Wk ∈Rh×h;
Learnable context vector cp ∈Rh;
Feature queue Q ←∅(max capacity N);
2: Input: Continuous target domain image stream {xi}∞i=1.
3: Output: Adapted prediction stream {Oi}∞i=1.
4: for i ∈[1, m] do
1. Semantic Prompt Feature Enhancement (SPFE)
5: Generate t stochastic feature maps {Fk}tk=1 ←fσ(xi) using MC Dropout.
6: Estimate uncertainty U ←Variance({Fk}tk=1) (Eq. (1)).
7: Select ni low-uncertainty nodes Vi ←SampleLowUncertainty(U, {Fk}, p%).
8: Aggregate node features into global query ˆqi ←AttentionPooling(Vi, cp) (Eq. (2)).
9: Retrieve commonality prompt pCO(i) ←ReverseAttention(ˆqi, PCO) (Eqs. (3) and (5)).
10: Retrieve heterogeneity prompt pHE(i) ←Attention(ˆqi, PHE) (Eqs. (4) and (6)).
11: Obtain enhanced features V∗i ←Vi + pCO(i) + pHE(i) (Eq. (7)).
2. Differentiable Graph Clustering Solver (DGCS)
12: Assemble pseudo-batch V∗←Q ∪{V∗i }.
13: Update feature queue: Q.enqueue(V∗i ).
14: if |Q| > N then
15: Q.dequeue().
×V 16: Calculate global similarity S ∈RV (Eq. (8)), where V is total nodes in V∗.
17: Determine node densities D(vi) ←Pj ReLU(S(i, j)) (Eq. (9)).
18: Define density-aware edge similarity S′(i, j) (Eq. (10)).
19: Formulate optimal transport cost matrix D from S′ (costs for selecting/rejecting k = V −Z edges) (Eqs. (11)
and (12)).
20: Solve for optimal transport plan Γ∗←Sinkhorn(D, θ) (Eqs. (13) and (14)).
21: Extract refined edge similarity S∗←Reshape(Γ∗:,2).
3. Joint Optimization & Adaptation
×C 22: Acquire semantic predictions P ∈RV for nodes in V∗from fσ.
23: Calculate graph consistency loss LG (Eq. (16)) and clustering loss LC (Eq. (17)).
24: Determine total loss L ←LG + λLC (Eq. (15)).
25: Update all learnable parameters {σ, PCO, PHE, Wq, Wk, cp} by backpropagating L.
4. Inference
26: Generate final prediction Oi ←fσ(xi) (using the updated parameters σ).
